item.title: How Many Pantsir Systems Has russia Placed on Moscow Rooftops to Protect Kremlin From Ukrainian Dron...
item.description: How Many Pantsir Systems Has russia Placed on Moscow Rooftops to Protect Kremlin From Ukrainian Drones  Defense Express‘There’s going to be more and more incidents like the drone attack’ – Nina Khrushcheva  Channel 4Video appears to show rooftop air defenses being installed on Moscow business tower wedged between GRU base and residential buildings  MeduzaRussia Deploys New Missile Systems on Civilian High-Rises to Stop Drone Invasions  Kyiv PostRussian Mi-26 Airlifts Pantsir AD System onto Moscow Rooftops to Counter Ukrainian Drone Onslaught  EurAsian Times
